# OctoDock — Complete Reference for AI Agents

> One MCP URL. All Apps. Remembers You.

OctoDock is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that acts as a universal adapter layer between AI agents and SaaS applications. Users connect their apps once, get a single MCP URL, and any AI agent can operate all authorized apps through that URL.

## Architecture

### MCP Tools (3 tools, ~300 tokens)

1. **octodock_do(app, action, params)** — Unified entry point for all operations
2. **octodock_help(app?, action?)** — On-demand operation reference
3. **octodock_sop(category?, name?)** — Saved workflow retrieval and execution

### Memory Engine

- PostgreSQL + pgvector for semantic search
- Four memory types: preference, pattern, context, sop
- Automatic identifier resolution (name → ID)
- Cross-agent memory sharing (works across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.)

### Middleware Pipeline

Every operation passes through:
- Parameter validation and auto-correction
- Circuit breaker (per-app fault isolation)
- Pre-context enrichment (shows current state before modifications)
- Post-check baseline comparison
- Response compression (large responses stored with ref ID)
- Operation logging (non-blocking)

## Connected Apps and Actions

### Notion (21 actions)
search, create_page, get_page, update_page, append_content, replace_content, delete_page, move_page, get_block, update_block, delete_block, query_database, create_database_item, get_database, list_databases, add_comment, get_comments, list_users, get_user, list_pages, get_page_property

### Gmail (18 actions)
search, read, send, reply, forward, create_draft, update_draft, send_draft, list_drafts, trash, untrash, mark_read, mark_unread, add_label, remove_label, list_labels, create_label, delete_label

### Google Calendar (11 actions)
get_events, get_event, create_event, update_event, delete_event, quick_add, list_calendars, create_calendar, delete_calendar, share_calendar, freebusy

### Google Drive (15 actions)
search, list, get_file, download, upload, update_file, delete, create_folder, move, copy, share, get_permissions, remove_permission, get_storage, empty_trash

### Google Sheets (10 actions)
create, get_values, update_values, append_values, clear_values, list_sheets, add_sheet, delete_sheet, get_metadata, batch_update

### Google Docs (7 actions)
create, get, append_text, insert_text, replace_text, batch_update, export

### Google Tasks (11 actions)
list_tasklists, create_tasklist, delete_tasklist, list_tasks, get_task, create_task, update_task, complete_task, uncomplete_task, delete_task, move_task

### YouTube (16 actions)
search, get_video, list_videos, get_channel, list_subscriptions, list_playlists, get_playlist, create_playlist, update_playlist, delete_playlist, list_playlist_items, add_to_playlist, remove_from_playlist, get_transcript, get_comments, post_comment

### GitHub (32 actions)
list_repos, get_repo, create_repo, search_code, search_issues, get_file, create_file, update_file, delete_file, list_issues, get_issue, create_issue, update_issue, list_issue_comments, add_issue_comment, list_prs, get_pr, create_pr, merge_pr, list_pr_comments, list_branches, create_branch, list_releases, create_release, list_workflows, trigger_workflow, list_gists, create_gist, star_repo, unstar_repo, list_starred, get_rate_limit

### System Actions
memory_query, memory_store, memory_delete_key, memory_delete_app, memory_delete_all, memory_export, import_memory, bot_conversations, sop_list, sop_get, sop_create, sop_update, sop_delete, note, find_tool, get_stored, http_request, batch_do, resolve_name, param_suggest, multi_search, resource_group_create, resource_group_get, undo_last, schedule_list, schedule_create, schedule_toggle, schedule_delete

## Authentication

- User auth: Google Sign-In (NextAuth.js)
- App auth: OAuth 2.0 (per-app), API Key, or Bot Token
- Token encryption: AES-256-GCM
- MCP auth: API key in URL path

## Technical Stack

- Language: TypeScript
- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Database: PostgreSQL + pgvector
- ORM: Drizzle ORM
- MCP SDK: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk (Streamable HTTP)
- Deployment: Replit
- Domain: octo-dock.com
- License: BSL 1.1 (free for personal use, no competing hosted service, converts to MIT after 4 years)

## Links

- Website: https://octo-dock.com
- Dashboard: https://octo-dock.com/dashboard
- Documentation: https://octo-dock.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/chaosmibu-blip/OctoDock
- MCP endpoint: https://octo-dock.com/mcp/{api-key}
